input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A hand shifts position over the right side of a rectangular metal tray containing mashed potato casserole. Yellow text overlay reads "My Wife Mashed Potato Casserole with Ground Beef." A metal grater rests on a red mat near a white container. The hand blurs slightly, indicating active preparation of the food surface.</think><answer></answer>

[4-10] A blue utensil drags across the surface creating parallel ridges. An arm sweeps rapidly right-to-left, obscuring the view, before the hand textures the left side. [10-14] The hand exits, revealing the fully ridged topping. The tray remains stationary until the blue utensil touches the bottom right corner. [14-24] A metal tray holds a casserole topped with textured, ridged mashed potatoes. A blue-handled fork rests on the right side of the surface, stabilized by an arm in a blue sleeve visible at the edge. To the left, a metal grater and white container remain stationary. [24-26] A dark shape enters from the top, casting a shadow over the upper tray section. [26-28] The object descends further, obscuring nearly the entire tray and hiding the fork, causing the scene to darken significantly while the grater and container on the left remain partially visible. [28-36] A large dark obstruction hovers overhead,

[56-60] A large metal pot tilts over the left side of a rectangular tray, dispensing liquid onto mashed potatoes and ground beef. The substance spreads across the white ridges, contrasting with dry meat toppings on the right. A blue-handled fork lies stationary near the center. [60-64] The pot dispenses thick white sauce over the left and center sections. The creamy liquid obscures the brown beef and ridged potatoes beneath. A hand grips the blue handle of the fork resting on the tray surface. [64-70] The metal pot remains tilted, pouring more thick white sauce which spreads further right across the casserole. The creamy layer expands, covering the toppings. The blue-handled fork stays near the expanding pool of sauce, held by a hand.

[70-74] A metal pot pours thick white sauce across a tray of brown ground beef and ridged potatoes, spreading rightward to obscure toppings while a blue-handled fork rests near the edge. [78-84] The pot dispenses the final sauce amounts, and the hand maneuvers the fork to spread the creamy layer to the tray's right edge, fully covering the remaining ground beef patches.

[84-88] A metal pot pours thick white sauce over a rectangular tray, blanketing the casserole and obscuring ground beef. A hand spreads the liquid with a blue-handled fork before the pot lifts away.
[88-94] The tray remains stationary, fully coated in white sauce with dark specks. Shadows shift across the glossy surface. A white spoon and grater sit on the left mat. No utensils touch the food.
[94-98] A hand places thin, flat white sheets onto the creamy surface. The sheets cover the bottom sections of the tray, lying atop the sauce and specks to form rectangular patches.

A hand places a thin white sheet onto the creamy mixture [98-100], adding to a row along the bottom of the metal tray. Three rectangular white sheets now lie flat across the bottom section, resting on the speckled creamy surface, while the upper portion remains uncovered with visible dark specks [100-114]. To the left, a white spoon and metal grater sit stationary on a red mat. Shadows shift slightly across the tray's surface. The video concludes with a close-up showing the text "please subscribe and hit like and thank you for watching".

To the left of the pan, a metal box grater with a red frame stands upright next to a white container visible in the upper left corner. At one point, a mound of brown ground beef is added to the center, though the scene is occasionally obscured by a large dark shadow overhead.

samples.output: <think>The metal pot remains tilted, dispensing thick white sauce onto the left section of the tray. The creamy liquid spreads further across the brown ground beef and ridged mashed potatoes, increasing coverage. The blue-handled fork lies stationary on the surface near the expanding pool of sauce.</think><answer></answer>
